# 🏗️ System Design

## Scalability

- Stateless APIs
- Horizontal scaling
- Queue-based async processing

## Reliability

- Retry mechanism (OCR failures)
- Dead-letter queues
- Idempotent jobs

## Performance

- Batch OCR calls
- Vector indexing (pgvector)
- Caching embeddings

## Security

- JWT Authentication
- Secure storage (S3 pre-signed URLs)
